name: maestro-workflow
description: Multi-LLM orchestration implementing the 5-stage coding workflow: Example Analysis → Hypothesis → Implementation → Debug Loop → Recursive Improvement. Based on "Towards a Science of Scaling Agent Systems" (Kim et al., 2025): - Centralized Consult architecture (Claude orchestrates, others advise) - Measured coordination (avoid MAS overhead in tool-heavy stages) - Tests-first selection (Poetiq pattern, not voting) Use when: Debugging complex issues, analyzing unfamiliar code, refactoring, or an...
